backend_api_checks.notes: Route prefix is /v1/leaderboard (not /leaderboard). 17 total entries exist, meets >= 10 requirement.

Route prefix is /v1/auth/anonymous (not /auth/anonymous). Requires 'platform' field (ios|android|taptap) in addition to device_id. Test device e2e_test_001 created successfully with initial save (beach_coins=200, glowstone=0).

api_route_correction.note: All API routes are prefixed with /v1, not bare paths. Auth endpoint also requires a 'platform' field.

notes: WebGL build does not exist at game-client/dist/webgl/index.html — Cocos Creator CLI is not installed, build must be triggered via Cocos Dashboard. Playwright 1.59.1 is available. Backend is fully healthy with all services (database, iap_apple, iap_google) reporting ok. Leaderboard has 17 seeded entries across 2 pages. Full E2E test spec has been written to game-client/e2e/glow-island.spec.ts covering all 4 test cases with canvas coordinate heuristics and network intercept assertions. To run full E2E: (1) build WebGL via Cocos Dashboard, (2) start 'npx serve game-client/dist/webgl -p 8080', (3) run 'npx playwright test --config game-client/playwright.config.ts'.
